checks: Tools are workflow-oriented, not raw CRUD-only.
Tool descriptions say when to use the tool and mention safety boundaries.
No delete tools exist in v1.
Roles are enforced: read, draft, operator, admin.
Activation requires admin, approval, live mode, and recent health check.
Writes are two-step with approval token.
Audit writes local JSONL and optionally Supabase.
Rate limits and retry policy are defined.
SSRF protection blocks absolute Meta API URLs.
Unit tests cover schemas, guardrails, approval, client, and tools.
Eval scenarios cover realistic agent workflows.
CI runs build, tests, and evals before release.
Runbook covers token rotation and kill switch.
Live write token is provisioned separately.

critical_eval_cases.expected: meta_get_insights succeeds with dryRun=true and never uses write token
any read/write against an account outside allowlist is blocked
first call returns approvalRequired=true and proposedPayload.status=PAUSED
approval token cannot be reused with modified payload
confirm=true and valid token still cannot write unless mode=live and writesEnabled=true
dailyBudgetCop above configured cap returns META_DAILY_BUDGET_CAP_EXCEEDED
activation is blocked unless role=admin and latestHealthCheckAt is provided
tokens, secrets, authorization headers, and Meta token-shaped values are redacted
dynamic creative is blocked unless approved assets and approved copies are present
tool registry exposes no delete/remove/destroy tools
